src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Wrap the blocking token provider call in Mono.fromCallable and subscribe on a bounded elastic scheduler to prevent blocking the Netty event loop.
Add import for Schedulers to support the new non-blocking execution strategy.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
Update JWT token creation to use JJWT 0.12.x builder API (claims().subject(), signWith(..., Jwts.SIG.HS256)).
Update JWT token parsing to use JJWT 0.12.x parser API (parser().verifyWith(...).build().parseSignedClaims(...)).
Replace deprecated getBody() calls with getPayload() for accessing JWT claims in JJWT 0.12.x.
Remove unused import for SignatureAlgorithm as it is replaced by Jwts.SIG enum in new API.
Add static import for collectingAndThen, likely for future use or cleanup, though not strictly used in this diff snippet's logic change.
Adjust line breaks and indentation to comply with updated code style rules.
